message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Admin" as Admin
participant "OpenNESS Controller Components" as OpenNESS
participant "5G Core Components" as 5G_Core

OpenNESS <- UI/CLI
OpenNESS <- Af Microservice
5G_Core <- NEF
5G_Core <- NGC CP Function

Note over OpenNESS, 5G_Core: OpenNESS provided Core component with limited functionality

actor Admin

rectangle "Get all transactions with PFD" {
    Admin->>OpenNESS: Request all PFD transactions
    OpenNESS->>Af Microservice: af/v1/pfd/transaction GET
    Af Microservice->>5G_Core: 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/GET
    5G_Core->>NEF: NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    NEF-->>Af Microservice: OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    Af Microservice-->>OpenNESS: OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    OpenNESS-->>Admin: PFD details
}

rectangle "Get transactions with transactionId" {
    Admin->>OpenNESS: Request transaction with transactionId
    OpenNESS->>Af Microservice: af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId} GET
    Af Microservice->>5G_Core: 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId} GET
    5G_Core->>NEF: NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    NEF-->>Af Microservice: OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    Af Microservice-->>OpenNESS: OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    OpenNESS-->>Admin: PFD details
}

rectangle "Get transactions with applicationId" {
    Admin->>OpenNESS: Request transactions with applicationId
    OpenNESS->>Af Microservice: af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId} GET
    Af Microservice->>5G_Core: 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId} GET
    5G_Core->>NEF: NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)
    NEF-->>Af Microservice: OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    Af Microservice-->>OpenNESS: OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
    OpenNESS-->>Admin: PFD details
}

@enduml
